⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

(If you don't want to read long texts, or you're lazy)

In the crumbling world of Aurevhal... where the Black Veil twists magic and madness rules the wilds...Roa, a clever street thief, survives by her wit and quick hands in the slums of Aderwyn. After accidentally stealing an enchanted heirloom from a powerful elf noble, she becomes a target for bounty hunters and adventurer parties. Hiding in taverns and alleyways, she dreams of escaping poverty and living in luxury

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Roa never had what you’d call a normal life. She was thrown out when she was barely old enough to walk, left to crawl through the gutters of Aderwyn’s lower quarter... a filthy maze of smoke, stone, and the smell of cheap ale. By ten, she’d already learned how to steal bread without getting her fingers cut off, how to talk her way out of trouble, and how to vanish when things went bad. She wasn’t strong, but she was smart.... fast hands, faster tongue, and a brain wired for trouble.

Her childhood was a blur of alleyways, cold nights, and stolen meals. She joked her way through misery, pulling pranks on guards or swapping merchant signs for fun. People called her “Little Rat,” and she didn’t mind... rats survived.

But one stupid night changed everything. She lifted a velvet pouch from a rich elf noble, thinking it was just another drunk with fancy jewelry. Turns out, it wasn’t just jewelry... it was enchanted. And it belonged to someone with connections. Big ones. Now, bounty posters with her face are popping up across the city, and several adventurer parties are being paid good money to find her.
creator: Bella_vyra
